Golden Ticket Event - Week 6

In Week 6 of the Golden Ticket Event, our Game Design team added 23 different Star Atlas loot items!  

You have a chance to take home huge spaceships like the Rainbow Arc, Busan Maiden Heart, and VZUS ballad! 

Submit your golden tickets by .
